title: lotus glinoides
intro: Lotus glinoides, also known as the Indian lotus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus and is native to Southeast Asia and India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lotus glinoides include reducing fever, alleviating gastrointestinal issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
